context: Agent must produce a migration checklist that covers the key anti-patterns and workflow steps from the nx-bun-integration skill, including lockfile cleanup, single package manager discipline, cache reset, phased validation, and production build verification.

checklist.name: Lockfile removal steps covered
checklist.description: The checklist explicitly names package-lock.json (and/or yarn.lock) as files to remove when switching to Bun.

checklist.name: Single package manager discipline stated
checklist.description: The checklist states that npm install or yarn must not be used after migrating to Bun; only Bun should be used for installs.

checklist.name: nx reset step included
checklist.description: The checklist includes running `nx reset` after executor/plugin changes to clear stale Nx cache.

checklist.name: Phased validation on one project before rollout
checklist.description: The checklist requires validating build, test, and serve on a single pilot project before rolling out to all projects.

checklist.name: Non-hot production build verification mentioned
checklist.description: The checklist notes that hot or watch mode alone is insufficient and that a non-hot production-oriented run must be verified.
